summary: Tested P0 attendance calculation fix. All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend UI confirmed working with realistic percentages. Keisley ADONIS shows exactly 81.6%, 38 school days, 7 absent days as expected.

test_results.Student modal shows correct pct/days/tre: PASS - 81.6%, 7 absent, 38 school days, monthly trend visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: admin@test.local / Admin1234! (click 'Sign in with email & password' first). Attendance fix verified: no school_days in DB, fallback uses unique attendance_records dates (37-38 unique dates). All 229 active students now show has_data=True with realistic percentages (avg 87.4%). Keisley ADONIS: 81.6%, 38 days, 7 absent. Period filter and cohort filter both work correctly.
